sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_maps (id UInt32, attributes Map(String, String)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT mapExtractKeyLike(attributes, 'match%') - mapExtractKeyLike(attributes, 'nonexistent%') AS result FROM test_maps;
SELECT id, mapExtractKeyLike(attributes, concat('key', CAST(id AS String))) AS matched_keys FROM test_maps WHERE id - (SELECT count() FROM test_maps WHERE id <= 2) > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id UInt32, info String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT a.id, mapExtractKeyLike(a.attributes, 'key%') AS matched_keys, (a.id - b.id) AS difference FROM test_maps AS a JOIN test_join AS b ON a.id = b.id WHERE difference > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_nulls (x Nullable(Int32), y Nullable(Map(String, String))) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT x, mapExtractKeyLike(ifNull(y, {}), 'key%') - ifNull(mapExtractKeyLike(y, 'nonexistent%'), {}) AS result FROM test_nulls;
SELECT id, mapExtractKeyLike(attributes, 'match%') AS matched FROM test_maps GROUP BY id, matched HAVING matched IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.id, mapExtractKeyLike(a.attributes, 'key%') - NULL AS result FROM test_maps AS a WHERE a.id < (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_maps) ORDER BY result;
